transcript: Please call Stella. Ask her to bring these things with her from the store. Six spoons of fresh snow peas, five thick slaps of blue cheese and maybe a snack for her brother Bob. We also need a small plastic snake and a big toy frog for the kids. She can scoop these things into three red bags and we will go meet her Wednesday at the train station.

errors.message: Use a comma before ‘and’ if it connects two independent clauses (unless they are closely connected and short).
errors.context: ...n scoop these things into three red bags and we will go meet her Wednesday at the tr...
